text:
Software Testing Life Cycle (STLC) 
 
The Software Testing Life Cycle (STLC) is a sequence of activities performed during the testing 
process to ensure software quality. 
 
  
Phases of STLC with Example 
1. Requirement Analysis 
 
What happens: 
 
’éĘ Testers study software requirements. 
’éĘ Identify testable requirements. 
’éĘ Prepare Requirement Traceability Matrix (RTM). 
 
Example: 
For an Online Shopping App, requirement: 
)Sy ŌĆ£User should be able to log in using email and password.ŌĆØ 
Tester identifies test scenarios like: 
 
’éĘ Valid login 
’éĘ Invalid login 
’éĘ Blank fields 
 
 
 
 

2. Test Planning 
 
What happens: 
 
’éĘ Create Test Plan. 
’éĘ Decide testing scope, tools, schedule, resources. 
’éĘ Estimate effort and cost. 
 
Example: 
 
For the shopping app: 
 
’éĘ Testing types: Functional, Regression, Smoke 
’éĘ Tool: Selenium 
’éĘ Duration: 2 weeks 
’éĘ Team: 3 testers 
 

 
 
 
 
 
3. Test Case Design / Development 
 
What happens: 
 
’éĘ Write test cases. 
’éĘ Prepare test data. 
’éĘ Review test cases. 
 
Example Test Case: 
Test Case: Verify login with valid credentials 
 
’éĘ Input: valid email & password 
’éĘ Expected Result: User should login successfully 
 
4. Test Environment Setup 
 
What happens: 
 
’éĘ Prepare hardware and software. 
’éĘ Install application. 
’éĘ Setup test servers and databases. 
 
Example: 
 
’éĘ Install shopping app on test server 
’éĘ Database connected 
’éĘ Browser: Chrome, Firefox 
 
 
5. Test Execution 
 
What happens: 
 
’éĘ Execute test cases. 
 
’éĘ Compare actual vs expected result. 
’éĘ Log defects. 
 
Example: 
 
’éĘ Enter valid credentials ŌåÆ Login successful Ō¼øŌ£ō 
’éĘ Enter wrong password ŌåÆ Error message not shown + (Defect logged) 

6. Test Closure 
 
What happens: 
 
’éĘ Prepare Test Summary Report. 
’éĘ Analyze test results. 
’éĘ Lessons learned. 
 
Example: 
 
’éĘ Total test cases: 120 
’éĘ Passed: 110 
’éĘ Failed: 10 
’éĘ Major defects fixed before release
